g.text: (ADAS / FCA -> AEB -> ESC / EHB / VSM -> brake feel)
1. ADAS/FCA sends object risk and path readiness
2. AEB collapses that into StopReq / DecelProfile / DomainHealth
3. ESC raises the minimum brake pedal floor
4. EHB and VSM apply hydraulic / intervention overlays
5. Driver perceives stepped red brake feel when AEB profile changes
